title: Principal Schema
description: Cerbos principal (user) attributes schema for conqrse

userLevel.description: User access level: super user, agency admin, or retailer operator

userType.description: User role within the organization: owner/admin (settings manager), lead/member (writer), or collaborator (read-only)

retailerId.description: Unique identifier of the retailer organization. Used for ownership checks.

products.description: Array of product identifiers accessible to this user
